mapper.update:
update reginfotable
user_id = #{user_id},
testinfoRoom_id = #{testinfoRoom_id},
ticketnum = #{ticketnum},
status = #{status},
where reginfo_id = #{reginfo_id}
mapper.select:
select * from reginfotable,busertable,testinfoRoom,roomtable,testinfotable,testtable where reginfotable.user_id=busertable.user_id and reginfotable.testinfoRoom_id=testinfoRoom.testinfoRoom_id and testinfoRoom.room_id=roomtable.room_id and testinfoRoom.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and ""=""
and concat(reginfotable.reginfo_id) like concat('%',#{reginfo_id},'%')
and concat(busertable.user_id) like concat('%',#{user_id},'%')
and concat(testinfoRoom_id) like concat('%',#{testinfoRoom_id},'%')
and concat(ticketnum) like concat('%',#{ticketnum},'%')
and concat(reginfotable.status) like concat('%',#{status},'%')
and concat(submit_time) like concat('%',#{submit_time},'%')
and concat(testinfotable.testinfo_id) like concat('%',#{testinfo_id},'%')
and concat(tname) like concat('%',#{tname},'%')
and concat(uname) like concat('%',#{uname},'%')
and concat(rname) like concat('%',#{rname},'%')
